user_system_path: Master Audit #445 — Pass 4 (Backend / runtime correctness), verdict CONCERN. Read-only forensic pass over cron orchestration, the paid-LLM gate, retries, the canary/egress switches, and failure modes; cross-checked live api_usage (no paid calls). The paid path is fail-closed and triple-gated before any spend (env assertPaidLlmAllowed + daily real-spend cap isOverDailyLimit $1.00/$0.25 + monthly Postgres budget RPC ensureAnthropicBudget); writes are idempotent so a mid-pipeline failure is recoverable, not corrupting. Fix-in-pass B-2: the morning-pipeline orchestrator (app/api/cron/morning-pipeline/route.ts) had no per-stage isolation — invokeStage called each child handler with no try/catch, so an uncaught throw in nightly_ops propagated out of the loop and silently dropped daily_brief (the value/delivery stage) and daily_maintenance for the whole day. invokeStage now wraps each handler: a throw becomes a recorded status:500/ok:false/threw:true result and the loop continues (overall 207). Fails safe — more stages run, never fewer. C-2 root-caused: directive_retry is a full second paid Sonnet call; live data shows ~74% of directives retry (471/637) from first-pass validateGeneratedArtifact failures — quality fix routed to Pass 5 + paid validation, NOT shipped blind; the generator retry docstring (understated worst case) was corrected. Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: The morning-pipeline orchestrator (app/api/cron/morning-pipeline/route.ts) + its route test for the B-2 stage-isolation fix, a comment-only docstring correction in lib/briefing/generator.ts, the Pass 4 audit doc (docs/backend/RUNTIME_CORRECTNESS.md), and control-plane. No schema, no deps, no other app/api routes.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema (supabase/**), no deps (package.json/lock), no other app/api routes beyond the morning-pipeline orchestrator. The C-2 generation-quality fix is deliberately deferred to Pass 5 (needs paid validation) and not touched here.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run app/api/cron/morning-pipeline && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build
required_browser_proof: N/A — deterministic backend/runtime change (cron orchestrator isolation + docstring), exercised by the morning-pipeline route test, not browser-observable.
acceptance_condition: Pass 4 ships as a PR: morning-pipeline now isolates each stage (a throw in one stage cannot drop the rest), locked by a new isolation invariant in the route test (4/4); docs/backend/RUNTIME_CORRECTNESS.md records the verified runtime model + findings B-1..B-6; gate:continuity + typecheck + lint + build green; #445 updated with the Pass 4 findings receipt.
anti_regression_checks: morning-pipeline route test green (4/4), including the new throw-isolation invariant; typecheck + lint + build clean
the stage-isolation change is additive and fail-safe — it can only cause MORE stages to run, never fewer; no existing pass/fail semantics changed
no schema, no deps, no other app/api routes touched; C-2 generation-quality fix deferred to Pass 5 (not shipped blind)
stop_condition: Stop when Pass 4 is up as a PR with deterministic proof (tests + gate:continuity + lint + build) and the #445 findings receipt is posted. The remaining C-2 quality fix is Pass 5 and needs paid validation; B-4 (budget reconciliation) + B-5 (retry-reason observability) are deferred follow-ups.
next_command: Review + merge the Pass 4 PR. Next unstarted audit pass is Pass 5 (AI/ML grounding), which owns the C-2 first-pass-validation-quality fix (needs paid validation), or frontend passes 6-8. Owner walls unchanged: live gem validation (paid), DRAFT PR #454 (broadcast-sender suppression), external guardian cron.
